'''''Reptor''''' was [[Jowart Typok]]'s personalized [[Repulsorlift transport/Legends|repulsorlift transport]]. He had converted the vehicle's passenger space into a cargo hold which, while he was hunting on [[Entooine]], held dozens of [[blue bantha]] horns as well as a single-person survival tent, a sleeping bag, a [[Glowrod/Legends|glowrod]], flares, and a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]].

==Appearances==
*{{ChallengeCite|70|Bantha Cannon}} {{1st}} {{Un}}
